# github-connector

dex.config connectors map to typed DexConnector envelope with opaque config RawExtension

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/dex/github-connector` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  dex.config: |
    connectors:
      - type: github
        id: github
        name: GitHub
        config:
          clientID: $dex.github.clientId
          clientSecret: $dex.github.clientSecret
          orgs:
            - name: example-org
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    dex:
      connectors:
      - config:
          clientID: $dex.github.clientId
          clientSecret: $dex.github.clientSecret
          orgs:
          - name: example-org
        id: github
        name: GitHub
        type: github
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  dex.config: |
    connectors:
    - config:
        clientID: $dex.github.clientId
        clientSecret: $dex.github.clientSecret
        orgs:
        - name: example-org
      id: github
      name: GitHub
      type: github
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

```yaml
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
